items.title: ACT public school language education plan found 'not fit for purpose' by parliamentary committee
items.summary: The ACT government's blueprint to deliver language education in Canberra public schools is "not fit for purpose", a parliamentary committee finds, prompting calls for the government to once again deliver a centralised ATAR-level language learning plan.

items.title: 'Pink army' gathers in Rundle Mall to welcome home victorious Thunderbirds
items.summary: Hundreds of fans have flocked to Rundle Mall, dressed in pink, to welcome back the Adelaide Thunderbirds following an unforgettable grand final win.
